_disclaimer: This file defines the standardised output format for INHERIT agent responses. All agents — regardless of task type — produce output conforming to this schema. Results are then written back into the INHERIT document with appropriate provenance.

agentId.description: Unique identifier for the agent that produced this output.

executedAt.description: When the task was executed (ISO 8601 UTC).

inputEntityId.description: The asset.id this task was run against.

confidence.description: Overall confidence in the output (0–100). Derived from source quality, result count, and model certainty.

results.description: Task-specific output. Structure varies by taskType — see agent-task-definitions.json outputFields for the expected keys per task.

searchesPerformed.description: Record of all searches or external lookups executed during this task run.

query.description: The search query or identifier submitted.

resultCount.description: Number of results returned by this search.

timestamp.description: When this individual search was performed (ISO 8601 UTC).

tokensUsed.description: Total LLM tokens consumed during this task — used for cost tracking and audit.

modelId.description: Identifier of the LLM model invoked (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-5', 'gpt-4o'). Enables reproducibility auditing.

provenance.description: Audit trail linking this agent output back to the originating request.

requestedBy.description: User ID or system identifier that triggered this task.

requestedAt.description: When the task was originally requested (may differ from executedAt if queued).

orchestratorVersion.description: Version of the orchestration layer that dispatched this task.

errors.description: Any errors or issues encountered during task execution. Non-fatal errors are logged here; the task may still produce partial results.

platform.description: The platform where the error occurred, if applicable.
